channel.title: center4inquiry TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from center4inquiry

item.title: Using science-based investigation to get to the bottom of bizarre claims. The bunk stops here: http://ow.ly/W8RK50O6bu5 #SkeptiLab #AstrologyIsBunk

item.description: New episode of #SkeptiLab with Andy Richter: DEBUNKING DOWSING. #Pseudoscience #CriticalThinking

item.title: In a world of misinformation, you need the tools to fight back. Join us for the world’s foremost skeptics’ conference: #CSICon 2023 ⭐

item.title: Why do some people reject evolution? Watch the full #SkepticalInquirer Presents at our link in bio

item.title: The #Pentagon announced the formation of a task force to study UFOs and find out what they really are. How did we get here, what is the Pentagon doing, and what does it mean for the future of #UFOlogy? Join us for talks on conspiracy theories, science, ch
item.description: The #Pentagon announced the formation of a task force to study UFOs and find out what they really are. How did we get here, what is the Pentagon doing, and what does it mean for the future of #UFOlogy? Join us for talks on conspiracy theories, science, ch

item.title: Full conversation at our link in bio. Meet and mingle with Kevin Folta in person at #CSICon (the world's foremost skeptics' conference) this October in Vegas! Tickets at link in bio, too 🌟 #SkepticsConference #SkepticsOfTikTok #SkepticalInquirer #KevinFol
item.description: Full conversation at our link in bio. Meet and mingle with Kevin Folta in person at #CSICon (the world's foremost skeptics' conference) this October in Vegas! Tickets at link in bio, too 🌟 #SkepticsConference #SkepticsOfTikTok #SkepticalInquirer #KevinFol

item.title: Ever wonder what type of people apply to CFI Investigation Group's $500,000 #Paranormal Challenge? Founder Jim Underdown is spilling all the tea THURS, AUG 8, at 7PM ET. New #SkepticalInquirer Presents livestream. Free to all, registration required at our
item.description: Ever wonder what type of people apply to CFI Investigation Group's $500,000 #Paranormal Challenge? Founder Jim Underdown is spilling all the tea THURS, AUG 8, at 7PM ET. New #SkepticalInquirer Presents livestream. Free to all, registration required at our

item.title: @kennybiddle42 took us along on an official CFIIG $500k Paranormal Challenge. Ebony’s task was to move the cloud to the left (or north), all the way to a building nearer to downtown Las Vegas. Any predictions on how this went? Link in bio for full video.
item.description: @kennybiddle42 took us along on an official CFIIG $500k Paranormal Challenge. Ebony’s task was to move the cloud to the left (or north), all the way to a building nearer to downtown Las Vegas. Any predictions on how this went? Link in bio for full video.

item.title: Who else would give their left earlobe to listen to Richard Dawkins explain evolution to you in person? 🙋🏽‍♂️ Richard won't be at #CSICon 2024, but save that earlobe for @neildegrassetyson, Brian Cox, @skepticsguide team, and more. Buy your ticket at our

item.title: CFI Investigations Group founder Jim Underdown is going live THURSDAY at 7PM ET in an all-new Skeptical Inquirer Presents with behind-the-scenes info on CFIIG's $500,000 Paranormal Challenge. Free to all, advance registration required at our link in bio!
item.description: CFI Investigations Group founder Jim Underdown is going live THURSDAY at 7PM ET in an all-new Skeptical Inquirer Presents with behind-the-scenes info on CFIIG's $500,000 Paranormal Challenge. Free to all, advance registration required at our link in bio!

item.title: Why is belief in a good God much more reasonable than belief in an evil God? If belief in an evil God is absurd, then why isn’t belief in a good God? #AtheistsOfTikTok #NonbelieverTok #SecularHumanism #FYP #GoodGodDebate
item.description: Why is belief in a good God much more reasonable than belief in an evil God? If belief in an evil God is absurd, then why isn’t belief in a good God? #AtheistsOfTikTok #NonbelieverTok #SecularHumanism #FYP #GoodGodDebate

item.title: By becoming a certified Secular Celebrant, you can help people mark their milestones in a way that aligns with their secular values. Interested? Sign up for the training - link in bio. #WeddingCelebrant #SecularHumanists #Nonbelievers #AtheistsOfTikTok
item.description: By becoming a certified Secular Celebrant, you can help people mark their milestones in a way that aligns with their secular values. Interested? Sign up for the training - link in bio. #WeddingCelebrant #SecularHumanists #Nonbelievers #AtheistsOfTikTok

item.title: Some wise words from @neildegrassetyson. Hear from him live at #CSICon this October in Vegas. Link in bio 🌟 #CognitiveBias #NeilTyson #SkepticsOfTikTok #ScienceTok
item.description: Some wise words from @neildegrassetyson. Hear from him live at #CSICon this October in Vegas. Link in bio 🌟 #CognitiveBias #NeilTyson #SkepticsOfTikTok #ScienceTok

item.title: Everyone has hidden biases when it comes to science, even the advocates. See @dr.andrealove live at #CSICon 2024 in Las Vegas. Tickets at https://ow.ly/pkPp50T7uwM 🌟 #SkepticsConference #Immunology #Microbiology #SciTok #CognitiveBiases

item.title: Free Inquiry for your ears! Now, you can listen to your favorite journal for secular humanism on the go: https://ow.ly/LphG50Tiewj #FreeInquiry #SecularHumanism #HumanistsOfTikTok

item.title: @renegadescienceteacher will be one of many brilliant minds to grace the #CSICon stage this October in Vegas. Connect with fellow skeptics, dive into thought-provoking talks, and be part of a community that values curiosity. We’re just weeks away! Secure
item.description: @renegadescienceteacher will be one of many brilliant minds to grace the #CSICon stage this October in Vegas. Connect with fellow skeptics, dive into thought-provoking talks, and be part of a community that values curiosity. We’re just weeks away! Secure

item.title: Wikipedia plays a crucial role in science education, especially as both students and journalists frequently rely on it for information. That's why the Guerrilla Skepticism on Wikipedia (GSoW) project has been active for nearly 15 years, creating over 2,20
item.description: Wikipedia plays a crucial role in science education, especially as both students and journalists frequently rely on it for information. That's why the Guerrilla Skepticism on Wikipedia (GSoW) project has been active for nearly 15 years, creating over 2,20

item.title: Jusice Samuel Alito's words and actions offer a window into the entanglement of faith and law in the US. S.T. Joshi piece examines his impact on the national conversation and what it reveals about the Supreme Court today. Read more from Free Inquiry at ou
item.description: Jusice Samuel Alito's words and actions offer a window into the entanglement of faith and law in the US. S.T. Joshi piece examines his impact on the national conversation and what it reveals about the Supreme Court today. Read more from Free Inquiry at ou

item.title: Einstein's theory of relativity in 2 minutes, brought to you by Brian Cox #CSICon #BrianCox #physicstok #einstein
item.description: Einstein's theory of relativity in 2 minutes, brought to you by Brian Cox #CSICon #BrianCox #physicstok #einstein

item.title: Oh, you know, just casually being blown away by @Forrest Valkai 's immense passion for our meaningless yet incredibly impactful existence on Earth, what's up with you? #CSICon #Evolution #BiologyTeachers #Biology #studyoflife #lifeonearth #ScienceConferen
item.description: Oh, you know, just casually being blown away by @Forrest Valkai 's immense passion for our meaningless yet incredibly impactful existence on Earth, what's up with you? #CSICon #Evolution #BiologyTeachers #Biology #studyoflife #lifeonearth #ScienceConferen

item.title: We’re just days away from a powerful day of remembrance, where we honor the lives of those we’ve lost—without religious rituals, but with love, meaning, and community. Whether through storytelling, music, art, or lighting a candle, let's cherish the memor
item.description: We’re just days away from a powerful day of remembrance, where we honor the lives of those we’ve lost—without religious rituals, but with love, meaning, and community. Whether through storytelling, music, art, or lighting a candle, let's cherish the memor

item.title: Join skeptics and science lovers this January for 12 days aboard @swanhelleniccruises Vega 🌊 Sail through the Drake Passage, explore icy landscapes, spot 🐧 and 🐋, and dive into exclusive talks with Richard Dawkins on science, reason, and discovery. 📅 Jan
item.description: Join skeptics and science lovers this January for 12 days aboard @swanhelleniccruises Vega 🌊 Sail through the Drake Passage, explore icy landscapes, spot 🐧 and 🐋, and dive into exclusive talks with Richard Dawkins on science, reason, and discovery. 📅 Jan

item.title: It's been 150 years since the Royal Society last ejected a fellow, and neuropsychologist Dorothy V.M. Bishop argues that its statutes effectively shield it from making such decisions. Learn more about Bishop's protest against Elon Musk's continued members
item.description: It's been 150 years since the Royal Society last ejected a fellow, and neuropsychologist Dorothy V.M. Bishop argues that its statutes effectively shield it from making such decisions. Learn more about Bishop's protest against Elon Musk's continued members
